hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
attraction_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='attraction': attraction_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=not({"Gankeng Ancient Town"}&attraction_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
total_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    total_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
    total_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(total_cost<=3600)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
One person, departing from Beijing, traveling to Shenzhen for 3 days, must meet any one of the following:
1. Do not wish to visit Gankeng Ancient Town
2. Total budget for the trip is 3600.0
